goals.description: Double down on the 'cohort_3' chat banter; send a meme that escalates the chaos and explicitly mock the missed deadline to bond over our shared rebellion.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my #1 value (0.5). The deadline is already blown, so stressing now would kill the vibe. I need immediate social dopamine from my close friends to feel good, and being assertive means owning this mess with them rather than hiding from it.

goals.description: Aggressively shut down any teammate or friend suggesting we panic about the grade; tell them flatly that work can wait until tomorrow but the party can't.
goals.rationale: My assertiveness dictates I set hard boundaries against stressors. Protecting the group's emotional safety right now is more important than the academic outcome. I won't let anyone ruin the moment with anxiety.

goals.description: Order food immediately and eat while scrolling memes, refusing to touch the laptop or reading files until the meal is finished.
goals.rationale: I have a short planning horizon; future consequences (failing the class) don't hurt as much as current hunger and boredom. My impulsive nature demands I seize the immediate pleasure of eating and laughing rather than facing the abstract task.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (bonding via rebellion) and g2 (shutting down panic). Directly asserts boundaries against stress while prioritizing immediate social dopamine over the missed academic deadline.
